title: Amaranthium (Magic: Illusory)
description: Amaranthium (Magic: Illusory) is a magic mod based around illusions as the third of three Official Magic DLC-like content sequels for the Amaranthium Series.
body:
Amaranthium (Magic: Illusory) is the final of three Magic-themed DLC-like content sequels for the Amaranthium series, adding items such as the 'Golden Ring', used in the crafting recipes for the 'Ring of Minor Illusion', 'Ring of invisibility', 'Ring of Phantasms', and the 'Ring of Enprisonment'. Using JEI or REI is realy helpful as always.
An illusion themed mod, adds the following items to irritate your opponents mid-fight:
1. Ring of Minor Illusion; shoot a projectile that will repeatedly jumpscare with an illusion...
2. Glowing potions & (Strengthened) Glowing potions; which apply Glowing or Glowing III to the entity.
3. Ring of Invisibility; makes you invisible.
4. Ring of Phantasms; summons a Minecrafter's fears beyond comprehension...
5. Staff of Infinitely Flashing Lights; the Staff of Infinitely Flashing Lights is made to bomb the screen with bright lights...                            USE AS A LAST RESORT ONLY...
6. The Staff of Ultimate Illusions; all of the effects listed above...



Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish.
